mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_access_log (request_id, community_id, user_id, user_name, user_role, user_ip, access_time, api_path, http_method, query_params, request_body, response_code, response_time, user_agent, create_time) VALUES (#{log.requestId}, #{log.communityId}, #{log.userId}, #{log.userName}, #{log.userRole}, #{log.userIp}, #{log.accessTime}, #{log.apiPath}, #{log.httpMethod}, #{log.queryParams}, #{log.requestBody}, #{log.responseCode}, #{log.responseTime}, #{log.userAgent}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_access_log WHERE access_time < #{beforeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_access_log_archive WHERE access_time < #{beforeDate}
